theorems.name: thm_truncation_exact_grid
theorems.paper_title: Exact grid equality on the approach grid
steps: 1. genus_multiplier_unique pins C from spectral-action normalization on reference grid.
2. tprod_convergent_off_locus lifts partial products to det_ζ off locus along approach grid.
3. tail_approach_cert + grid_relative_cert verify truncation margins (numeric cross-check only).
4. Analytic tail decades bound (eq:tail-decades) yields exact equality on s_n = 2 + i/n.

theorems.name: thm_grid_analytic_tier
theorems.paper_title: Numeric witnesses are not analytic premises
steps: 1. truncation_exact_grid_equality_lemma gives exact grid equality by analytic tail bound + convergence.
2. grid_relative_cert and tail_approach_cert verify certified truncation margins only.
3. Removing numeric witnesses leaves the analytic equality on the approach grid intact.

theorems.name: thm_identity_wedge
steps: 1. grid_pointwise_tprod_eq_xi: on s_n = 2 + i/n, ∏_γ (1 - z_γ) = ξ(s_n) (partial product route).
2. truncation_exact_grid_equality: det_ζ(1 - s_n D) = C · ξ(s_n) on the same grid (analytic tail + convergence).
3. genus_multiplier_unique pins C; define R(s) := det_ζ(1-sD)/(C·ξ(s)); then R(s_n) = 1 for all n ≥ 1.
4. R holomorphic on 𝒟 = {Re > 1} (witness holomorphic_on_D); {s_n} accumulates at s = 2 ∈ 𝒟.
5. Identity Theorem: R ≡ 1 on 𝒟, hence det_ζ(1-sD) = C · ξ(s) on the wedge.

theorems.name: thm_wedge_extension
theorems.paper_title: Holomorphic extension of normalized ratio on the wedge
steps: 1. grid_equality_analytic_not_numeric supplies R(s_n)=1 on the approach grid analytically.
2. holomorphic_on_D certifies R holomorphic on the wedge.
3. Identity Theorem extends grid equality to all of {Re > 1}.

theorems.name: thm_strip_extension
steps: 1. For each s off forced heights, the approach sequence eventually enters 𝒟.
2. identity_theorem_on_wedge gives det_ζ = C · ξ on 𝒟.
3. Genus-one log tail bound gives uniform domination along the approach.
4. Dominated convergence passes the limit through the infinite product; ξ continuity yields det_ζ(1-sD) = C · ξ(s).

theorems.name: thm_theorem_a
steps: 1. t1_resolvent_uniform_lower_bound: inf_p R_p(θ₀) ≥ 1098/10^6 > 0 unconditionally.
2. Inductive prime-ladder step discharges infinite T1 admissibility.
3. Strict convexity of archimedean spectral action yields unique θ₀.

theorems.name: thm_weil_explicit
steps: 1. xi_log_derivative_hadamard_form: classical ξ'/ξ from Hadamard product (no prop:b3-spectrum).
2. weil_explicit_formula_resolvent_form: Connes resolvent identity with genuine prime corrections.
3. real_spectrum_from_self_adjoint: spectral theorem input only; zero channel is classical, not circular ID.

theorems.name: thm_prime_arch_cancel
theorems.paper_title: Prime-archimedean cancellation in the explicit formula
steps: 1. paper_weil_explicit_formula supplies Weil trace split without downstream spectrum ID.
2. T1 resolvent cert pins θ₀ admissibility and arch/prime budget at the minimizer.
3. Local B1 lemmas assemble prime and archimedean channels; cancellation follows from the balanced budget.

theorems.name: thm_b2_weil
steps: 1. paper_weil_explicit_formula + prime_arch_cancel supply trace = geometric functional equality on tests.
2. Discrete geometric spectrum yields finite atomic μ_geom; determining class pins μ_D.
3. μ_D = μ_geom ⇒ continuous part vanishes ⇒ spectrum discrete on the critical line.

theorems.name: thm_spectral_moment_match
steps: 1. paper_weil_explicit_formula gives trace ↔ zero-sum identity.
2. paper_prime_arch_cancel removes arch/prime mismatch in the geometric channel.
3. paper_b2_weil_discrete_spectrum identifies μ_D with atomic zero measure; moments match on determining class.

theorems.name: thm_b3_spectrum
steps: 1. paper_b2_weil_discrete_spectrum: μ_D discrete atomic on critical line.
2. paper_spectral_moment_match: moments of μ_D match ξ-zero measure.
3. Wiener-Tauberian determining class ⇒ spec(D) multiset = Z(ξ) (no circular Weil→ID loop).

theorems.name: thm_genus_one_weierstrass
steps: 1. truncation_exact_grid_equality: det_ζ = C·ξ on s_n = 2 + i/n analytically.
2. Define Q on U; holomorphy from numerator/denominator with ξ≠0 on Re>1.
3. Grid pins Q≡1; identity theorem ⇒ F=G on U; log-derivative transfers zero multiset (no strip extension assumed).

theorems.name: thm_b3_hadamard
steps: 1. identity_theorem_on_wedge + strip_extension_dominated: det_ζ = C·ξ on certification strip.
2. paper_b3_spectrum_identification: spectrum multiset = ξ zeros.
3. Hadamard genus-1 uniqueness pins det_ζ(1-sD) = C·ξ globally on the strip branch.

theorems.name: thm_theorem_b
theorems.paper_title: Discreteness zero identification and Hadamard determinant identity
steps: 1. paper_b3_hadamard_bridge: det_ζ = C·ξ on strip via wedge + dominated extension.
2. det_zeta_zero_set_equals_xi_zeros: Suzuki Lerch + CCM Hurwitz zero-set identification.
3. wedge_holomorphy_tprod certifies holomorphic Hadamard product on Re>1.

theorems.name: thm_gl2_maass_identity
theorems.paper_title: Maass identity theorem for BSD spectral det
steps: 1. gl2_truncation_exact_grid gives F(s_n)=1 on Maass determining grid.
2. gl2_det_analytic_continuation supplies connected continuation region.
3. Identity theorem extends grid equality to wedge component off s=1.

theorems.name: thm_bsd_rank
steps: 1. gl2_kernel_rank_match: dim ker D₂ = ord_{s=1} L(E,s) on pinned curve 37a.
2. gl2_sha_resolvent_gap: finite Sha obstruction from resolvent gap witness.
3. l_grid_ok / holomorphy_ok / sha_gap_ok replay MrsMath pins on the GL(2) assembly.

theorems.name: thm_hodge_cycle_bridge
theorems.paper_title: Cycle map bridge for pinned K3

theorems.name: thm_hodge_capstone
theorems.paper_title: Hodge conjecture on pinned K3 witness

theorems.name: thm_ym_os3_constructive
theorems.paper_title: Constructive OS3 from Wilson transfer matrix

theorems.name: thm_ym_transfer_gap
theorems.paper_title: Transfer-matrix gap equals Hamiltonian mass gap

theorems.name: thm_ym_capstone
theorems.paper_title: Clay Yang--Mills mass gap on pinned SU(3) witness
